rule_metadata.author: Li Ling, Andy Parkidomo, Robert Rakowski, Blake Hartstein (Bloomberg L.P.)
rule_metadata.title: Shell Execution GCC  - Linux

rules.rule_text:
title: Shell Execution GCC  - Linux
id: 9b5de532-a757-4d70-946c-1f3e44f48b4d
status: test
description: 'Detects the use of the "gcc" utility to execute a shell. Such behavior
  may be associated with privilege escalation, unauthorized command execution, or
  to break out from restricted environments.

  '
references:
- https://gtfobins.github.io/gtfobins/gcc/#shell
- https://gtfobins.github.io/gtfobins/c89/#shell
- https://gtfobins.github.io/gtfobins/c99/#shell
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/linux-restricted-shell-breakout-via-linux-binary-s.html
author: Li Ling, Andy Parkidomo, Robert Rakowski, Blake Hartstein (Bloomberg L.P.)
date: 2024-09-02
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1083
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith:
    - /c89
    - /c99
    - /gcc
    CommandLine|contains: -wrapper
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - /bin/bash,-s
    - /bin/dash,-s
    - /bin/fish,-s
    - /bin/sh,-s
    - /bin/zsh,-s
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
